description: Semantic data mapping for AI integration and dataset generation.

User.description: Base user account for authentication and role management.

fields.user_type: Role identifier: student, landlord, or admin.
fields.account_status: Status of the account: approved, pending, or rejected.

fields.category: Type of housing: room, apartment, or studio.
fields.gender_type: Intended residents: male, female, or mixed.
fields.price: Monthly rental cost in local currency.
fields.amenities: List of features like Wifi, AC, Electricity included, etc.

BookingRequest.description: Transaction record for a student booking a property.

fields.status: Current state: pending, approved, or rejected.

fields.content: The text body of the message.
fields.is_chat_closed: Boolean flag indicating if the thread is archived.
fields.contact_message: Optional link to a guest inquiry ID.

query_logic.logic: Filter by price, category, and gender_type.
Filter by student_id and return latest status.

security_policy.access_control: Users can only access records where user_id matches or public listings.
